posts.author: AvaJ (Ava Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: whatever new update you guys made where links no longer work in text fields is causing huge upheavel to my organization. I need you all to put it back to where links still work in text fields. Im going to have to fix at least 50 automations with a new link field and then copy and paste all the data because change a field type to link is not available. please change it back asap
